subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! On this Day the divine Tree proclaimeth "The Truth hath come!", and the Call from Sinai is raised high. The Interlocutor appeareth with but a single staff [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی امروز سدره بقد اتی الحق ناطق و ندای طور مرتفع حضرت کلیم با یک عصا بر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action
